examples: The mother provides the embryo with nourishment and a place to grow.
Sugar gives quick relief to hunger but provides no lasting nourishment.
It may worsen the nourishment problem in low-income countries.
Lacking that emotional nourishment, we fill ourselves up in other ways: shopping, consuming, striving, and achieving.
Unlike most butterflies, it does not feed on flowers but gets its nourishment from honeydew.
